case_title: FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA vs. HARRIS, SHEILA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, SHEILA GILBERT, JONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL STREET, APT. #1308, LEASE FORFEITED
